settings.title: Your Direct Line to Jay Carter

settings.editor: Skip the algorithms. Join Jay's exclusive platform for unfiltered live streams, Q&A sessions, and community built around real connection.

settings.title: Building in Public: Platform Launch Week

settings.editor: Tired of algorithms deciding who sees your content? This platform gives creators and fans a direct connection without the noise.
Your content reaches everyone who joined. No views hidden, no shadow bans.
Members pay you directly. No platform taking 50% of your earnings.
Build a loyal fanbase that actually cares. Not just passive scrollers.
Everything you need to connect with Jay and the community, all in one place.

• Join live Q&A sessions
  • Watch exclusive streams
  • Access replay library
  • Download select content

• Chat during live streams
  • Join discussion forums
  • Direct message members
  • Member-only channels

• Member-only videos
  • Behind-the-scenes content
  • Early access to releases
  • Bonus resources & guides

• Submit questions for Jay
  • Influence future content
  • Get personal responses
  • Participate in polls

After 8 years creating content on traditional platforms, Jay built this community to connect directly with fans—no algorithms, no gatekeepers. Here, you get unfiltered access to Jay's process, exclusive streams, and a community that's building something together.
Getting started is simple. Here's how to join the community.
Select a membership that fits your budget and get instant access to the community.
Set up your profile, customize your settings, and introduce yourself to the community.
Watch streams, join discussions, and connect with Jay and other members immediately.
Choose the membership level that works for you. All tiers include access to the community and live streams.

• Access to public streams
  • Community chat
  • Limited replay access
  • Basic member profile

• All Free Tier features
  • Exclusive member streams
  • Full replay library
  • Priority chat support
  • Download permissions
  • Members-only forum

• All Pro Tier features
  • 1-on-1 video calls with Jay
  • VIP-only live sessions
  • Personal Discord channel
  • Early feature access
  • Exclusive merchandise
  • Your name in credits
"Finally, a platform where I can actually connect with creators I love. No ads, no algorithm nonsense. Just pure content."
"The live Q&A sessions are incredible. Jay actually answers my questions and the community vibe is unmatched."
"Best $19 I spend every month. The exclusive content and behind-the-scenes access is worth way more."
Start your free trial today. Cancel anytime. No hidden fees.
